title: La revoltosa
writer: Carlos Fernández Shaw, José López Silva, Guillermo Fernández Shaw
actors: Carmen Sevilla, Tony Leblanc, Tomás Blanco
plot: The beautiful Mari Pepa lives with her brother and her aunt in the slums of Madrid. Because of the ragamuffins of her brother, petty thief, she is forced to move house, ending up, coincidences of life, to the courtyard where Felip...
